title: Create Aeronautics: Physics Gun (Garry's Mod)
description: Physics Gun from Garry's Mod added into Create: Aeronautics.
body:
Physics Gun from Garry's Mod added into Create: Aeronautics.

This mod replaces the Creative Physics Staff from Create: Aeronautics with a custom “Physics Gun” design, obviously inspired by Garry's Mod. 

If you've ever wanted something new and interesting in your Aeronautics experience, then this is the mod for you.

The beam originates from the Physics Gun's barrel just like in GMod.

100% client-side

**If you are joining someone else or a server, AzureLib must be installed on there for this mod to be usable**

|

Requires:

• Create

• Create Aeronautics

• AzureLib
